Read-only inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms the pack-level claim is honest and fully supported.

Coverage: validateSearchCoreCp250Coverage runs against the live closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-250 entry (not a synthetic fixture); deliverable distribution (claude_review:4, implementation:11, ui:18, security_audit:4, fixture:1, test:1, hermes_evidence:1=40) and micro-title distribution (Primary:4/Secondary:22/Permission:14) were manually reconciled against included_units and match exactly.

Boundaries: All CP250 factory outputs are frozen plain-object descriptors (freezeCp250Result/freezeCp250Validation) with every runtime-dispatch, write-product-state, DB, object-storage, command-runtime, and Hermes-runtime-receipt flag set false, plus no_real_data/synthetic_only true. No I/O, DB, network, or fs writes exist in any CP250 path. command-evidence confirms no_real_data:true and writes_product_state:false. Manifest holds production_ready:false / status implemented_pending_review — no production-ready overclaim; production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification label and Hermes only sets production_ready_candidate (pending review).

Authority: claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false are enforced in registry constants, the descriptor authority_boundary, the no-write attestation, and the descriptor validator. Claude remains read-only reviewer, not final approver.

Hermes: appears only as a deterministic evidence-packet descriptor (H07.CP00-250…) with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false — not embedded in product runtime.

Contract sync: validate-rp07-search-core-contract.mjs deepEqual-enforces the stored ui_workflow_slice_descriptor, cp250_requirements, and cp250_no_write_attestation against code; current_pack, program.current_pack_id, and historical_pack_bindings.at(-1) all equal CP00-250.

Tests/hardening: model.test.js asserts substantive invariants (coverage validity, descriptor-only rows, leak guards, authority boundary, handoff target CP00-251 / RP07.P04.M05.S15). All executed validation commands exit 0 (closeout-pack:validate is correctly deferred as a post-review gated command per command-evidence notes). Review hardening preconditions met: auth preflight returned valid non-empty JSON (1448 bytes, exit 0), readiness ready:true; prompt is 2263 bytes, no full diff/source embedded, tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob.

Scope: unrelated dirty/untracked files — including the LDIP claude-review-results/c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json artifact — are correctly classified as out-of-scope by changed-file-scope.json and do not affect this pack.
